productDisplayName: Belmonte Men Golden Bright Assorted Cufflinks
description: Style Note Understated yet elegant, this pair of designer cuff links from belmonte offers a refined finish to a formal shirt. This small accessory with dice in the centre has a big impact on the look of a dress or suit a perfect accompaniment for any shirt. Product Details Square cuff links made of steel, with textured design in gold on either sides of the cuff links Cylindrical back to hold the cuff in place Size Width: 2 cm
